title: Evangelion Q Biggest Anime Box Office Opening in Japan Yet
display_title: Evangelion Q Biggest Anime Box Office Opening in Japan Yet
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Q: Biggest Anime Box Office Opening in Japan Yet?             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Nov 28, 2012 3:25 am Check it out: http://boxofficemojo.com/intl/Japan/opening/ according to this, it's currently at #11 all time and is the highest anime release on the list. probably not adjusted for inflation but still......kind of a big deal.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Wed Nov 28, 2012 5:20 am It's also the only Eva movie on the top 100, that's strange.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Nov 28, 2012 5:34 am A.T. Fish wrote: It's also the only Eva movie on the top 100, that's strange.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Wed Nov 28, 2012 6:07 am Xard wrote: Not really because 3.0 has opened on way larger number of screens than any previous Eva film.
